who: restaurant franchise owners processing 5–15 compliance reports/month
offer: For restaurant franchise owners processing 5–15 compliance reports/month, delays in report preparation cause potential penalties. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation.
problem: Difficulty in preparing timely compliance reports, leading to potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant franchise owners
Indie Hackers posts about compliance report solutions
DM outreach to restaurant franchise owners with demo video
Community forums where restaurant franchise owners share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for reports
Allow CSV import for existing report data
Enable one-click export of generated reports
